structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Definition
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Each system shall be broken into separate Zone Groups composed of a collection of one or more zones served by a single air handler.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Each system shall be broken into separate Zone Groups composed of a collection of one or more zones served by a single air handler.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Each system shall be broken into separate Zone Groups composed of a collection of one or more zones served by a single air handler.

evidence_quote: Each system shall be broken into separate Zone Groups composed of a collection of one or more zones served by a single air handler.
evidence_text: Each system shall be broken into separate Zone Groups composed of a collection of one or more zones served by a single air handler.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Independent Schedules and Modes
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Each Zone Group shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes from other Zone Groups.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Each Zone Group shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes from other Zone Groups.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Each Zone Group shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes from other Zone Groups.

evidence_quote: Each Zone Group shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes from other Zone Groups.
evidence_text: Each Zone Group shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes from other Zone Groups.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Mode Consistency
structured_payload_candidate.summary: All zones in each Zone Group shall be in the same zone-group operating mode. If one zone enters a mode other than Unoccupied Mode, all zones in that Zone Group shall enter that mode.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: If one zone in a Zone Group is placed in any zone-group operating mode other than Unoccupied Mode (due to override, sequence logic, or scheduled occupancy)
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: All zones in that Zone Group shall enter that mode.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: All zones in each Zone Group shall be in the same zone-group operating mode as defined in Section 5.4.6. If one zone in a Zone Group is placed in any zone-group operating mode other than Unoccupied Mode (due to override, sequence logic, or scheduled occupancy), all zones in that Zone Group shall enter that mode.

evidence_quote: All zones in each Zone Group shall be in the same zone-group operating mode as defined in Section 5.4.6. If one zone in a Zone Group is placed in any zone-group operating mode other than Unoccupied Mode (due to override, sequence logic, or scheduled occupancy), all zones in that Zone Group shall enter that mode.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Occupied-Standby Mode Not a Zone-Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Occupied-standby mode applies to individual zones, is considered a zonal subset of Occupied Mode, and shall not be considered a zone-group operating mode.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Occupied-standby mode applies to individual zones, is considered a zonal subset of Occupied Mode, and shall not be considered a zone-group operating mode.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Occupied-standby mode applies to individual zones, is considered a zonal subset of Occupied Mode, and shall not be considered a zone-group operating mode.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Occupied Mode Condition - Scheduled Time
structured_payload_candidate.summary: A Zone Group is in Occupied Mode when the time of day is between the Zone Group's scheduled occupied start and stop times.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: The time of day is between the Zone Group's scheduled occupied start and stop times.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Zone Group is in Occupied Mode.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: A Zone Group is in the Occupied Mode when any of the following is true: a. The time of day is between the Zone Group's scheduled occupied start and stop times.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Occupied Mode Condition - Override
structured_payload_candidate.summary: A Zone Group is in Occupied Mode when the schedules have been overridden by the occupant override system.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: The schedules have been overridden by the occupant override system.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Zone Group is in Occupied Mode.
